Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Subhashree Radhakrishnan
Message:
Add collision RCA pipeline with VLM-based analysis

This commit adds the complete collision root cause analysis pipeline:

## Documentation
- README_Collision_RCA.md: Comprehensive guide for running the pipeline

## Configuration Files
- config_qwen3vl_brain_minimal.yml: W3 workflow config (Qwen3-VL)
- config_gpt4o_brain_minimal.yml: W4 workflow config (GPT-4o)

## Core Components
- register.py: Agent workflow registration with tool integration
- video_crop_tool.py: Temporal video cropping tool
- spatial_crop_image_tool.py: Spatial region cropping tool
- video_spatial_crop_tool.py: Combined temporal+spatial cropping
- color_identification_tool.py: Vehicle color identification tool

## Pipeline Scripts
- run_w3_pipeline.sh: Run W3 (Qwen3-VL) pipeline only
- run_w3_w4_pipeline.sh: Run both W3 and W4 pipelines
- evaluate_conclusions_updated.py: LLM-based evaluation script
- view_results_enhanced.py: Streamlit visualization app
- list_experiments.sh: List saved experiments
- revert_experiment.sh: Restore experiment configs

## Data
- data/GT.xlsx: Ground truth annotations

## Reference Experiment
- experiments/exp_20251209_025604_so_far_best/: Best performing config (W3=6.6)

Key features:
- VLM agent with video/spatial cropping tools
- Structured reasoning prompts for collision analysis
- LLM-based evaluation with semantic matching
- Experiment tracking and config management
- Streamlit UI for result visualization

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Ryan Ji
Message:
Add Workflow 4: Qwen3-VL-235B as Brain + Cropping Tools

- New VLM: Qwen3-VL-235B (Lepton AI endpoint)
- Uses video_url format (full video base64) instead of frame extraction
- Config: config_qwen3vl_brain.yml with use_video_url=true
- Parallel runner: run_workflow4_parallel.sh
- Code supports both GPT-4o (image frames) and Qwen3-VL (video_url)

Workflow comparison:
- W3: GPT-4o (8 frames as image_url)
- W4: Qwen3-VL-235B (full video as video_url)

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Ryan Ji
Message:
Add Workflow 3: VLM as Brain + Cropping Tools

- VLM (GPT-4o) directly as reasoning agent with vision
- Uses video_analysis_qwen_workflow (VLM brain architecture)
- Same 3 cropping tools: video_crop, spatial_crop, video_region
- Config: app/video_analysis_qwen/configs/config_vlm_brain.yml
- Parallel runner: run_workflow3_parallel.sh

Workflow comparison:
- W1: LLM orchestrator, 2 baseline tools (video_skim_caption, video_detailed_caption)
- W2: LLM orchestrator, 5 tools (W1 + video_crop, spatial_crop, video_region)
- W3: VLM as brain, 3 cropping tools (VLM has native vision, no caption tools needed)

All workflows use same cropping tool implementations from vlm_collision_analysis branch.
